notes_for_orchestrator: Significant version gap found: local init_build.py is 608 lines vs repo's 151 lines. Local has full v2 orchestrator support including meta.json generation, incomplete build prescreening, and worker brief stub generation. build_status.py and update_build.py were completely missing from repo - now added. Fixed .gitignore 'build/' pattern which was blocking templates/build/ directory. All scripts tested with --help successfully. The BUILD_ORCHESTRATOR.md doc was sanitized to replace V-specific references with generic 'the user' language for distribution.
